prompt: Low-angle exterior view of a finished cedar pergola spanning a fieldstone patio in a Windham NH backyard. Heavy 6x6 western red cedar posts, chamfered tops, support a grid of 2x6 rafters and slat purlins above. Cafe-style string lights drape across the top in two even runs. The patio underneath uses irregular flagstone with tight grout joints. A pair of dark powder-coated steel chairs and a small round bistro table sit center-frame. Shot with a 35mm prime, late afternoon sun streaming through the slatted top creating dramatic stripes of warm gold light on the stone below. A coiled red garden hose by the foundation is the only saturated color. High-contrast slightly desaturated palette, working-contractor catalog feel, NOT HGTV bright. No readable text, no logos.
